purpose: Track upstream refs known to build and define the wrapper contract for pymc-repeater-console.

release_policy.release_builds: must pin pyMC Repeater and pyMC Console refs to commit SHAs
release_policy.scheduled_main_tests: may test upstream main but must not publish release images
release_policy.compatibility_shims: must detect and document upstream breakage, not hide it

pymc_repeater.resolved_sha: resolved at Docker build time from upstream dev

wrapper_contract_notes: No upstream source should be patched on disk.
This dev add-on version tracks upstream pyMC_Repeater dev until tagged pymc_tcp support exists.
pyMC_core is pinned to a commit with TCPLoRaRadio support.
The Docker build and runtime service fail fast if installed repeater.config lacks pymc_tcp support.
pymc_usb Wi-Fi support uses upstream radio_type=pymc_tcp and TCP modem protocol on port 5055 by default.
Local substitute APIs under upstream /api routes are not allowed in normal operation.
If upstream does not provide /api/analytics routes, the wrapper must not fake them.
